# UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES
## 2022 FINANCIAL DISCLOSURE STATEMENT

**Form A** - For Use by Members, Officers, and Employees

(Stamped: HAND DELIVERED - LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER - 2024 FEB -1 PM 12:07 - Office of the Clerk, U.S. House of Representatives)

**Name:** Rohit Khanna  
**Daytime Telephone:** 202-225-2631

**FILER STATUS:** [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives - State: CA - District: 17  
[ ] Officer or Employee - Employing Office: (blank) - Staff Filer Type: Shared [ ] / Principal Assistant [ ]

**REPORT TYPE:** [ ] 2022 Annual (Due: May 15, 2023) - [X] Amendment - [ ] Termination (Date of Termination: blank)

## PRELIMINARY INFORMATION - ANSWER EACH OF THESE QUESTIONS

- **A.** Did you, your spouse, or your dependent child own any reportable asset worth more than $1,000 at the end of the reporting period or receive more than $200 in unearned income from any reportable asset during the reporting period? - **Yes [X]** No [ ]
- **B.** Did you, your spouse, or your dependent child purchase, sell, or exchange any securities or reportable real estate in a transaction exceeding $1,000 during the reporting period? - **Yes [X]** No [ ]
- **C.** Did you or your spouse have earned income of $200 or more during the reporting period? - **Yes [X]** No [ ]
- **D.** Did you, your spouse, or your dependent child have any reportable liability more than $10,000 at any point during the reporting period? - **Yes [X]** No [ ]
- **E.** Did you hold any reportable positions during the reporting period or in the current calendar year up through the date of filing? - Yes [ ] **No [X]**
- **F.** Did you have any reportable agreement or arrangement with an outside entity during the reporting period or in the current calendar year up through the date of filing? - Yes [ ] **No [X]**
- **G.** Did you, your spouse, or your dependent child receive any reportable gift(s) totaling more than $415 in value from a single source during the reporting period? - Yes [ ] **No [X]**
- **H.** Did you, your spouse, or your dependent child receive any reportable travel or reimbursements for travel totaling more than $415 in value from a single source during the reporting period? - Yes [ ] **No [X]**
- **I.** Did any individual or organization make a donation to charity in lieu of paying you for a speech, appearance, or article during the reporting period? - Yes [ ] **No [X]**

## IPO AND EXCLUSION OF SPOUSE, DEPENDENT, OR TRUST INFORMATION

- **IPO** - Did you purchase any shares allocated as part of an Initial Public Offering during the reporting period? - Yes [ ] **No [X]**
- **TRUSTS** - Have you excluded details of a qualified blind trust or excepted trust? - Yes [ ] **No [X]**
- **EXEMPTION** - Have you excluded any other assets, unearned income, transactions, or liabilities of a spouse or dependent child because they meet all three tests for exemption? - Yes [ ] **No [X]**
